last_response: Hey, did you notice how you've clicked on me 46 times since that Amazon reminder? Gotta love your commitment to checking for packages! 🌧️🍃 Oh, watch out—you've got a new 'click-a-thon' going strong there. Keep at it; I've been doing the same with my screws and bolts lately—never know when you'll need an extra wrench in life (or code).
